features.name: Rolling pitcher strikeout rate
features.formula: strikeout plate appearances divided by total batters faced over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitcher starts: 3, 5, 10, season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only games completed before the target game date
features.missing_policy: minimum 20 batters faced per window; otherwise back off to season-to-date then league average
features.leakage_risk: medium: plate appearance outcomes must be grouped only from prior games
features.required_visual: rolling K% line by pitcher with league average band

features.name: Rolling strikeouts per nine innings
features.formula: strikeouts multiplied by 9 divided by innings pitched over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitcher starts: 3, 5, 10, season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only games completed before the target game date
features.missing_policy: minimum 6 innings pitched per window; otherwise null and rely on K% features
features.leakage_risk: medium: innings and strikeouts must come from prior appearances only

features.name: Rolling K-BB rate
features.formula: strikeout rate minus walk rate over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitcher starts: 5, 10, season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only games completed before the target game date
features.missing_policy: minimum 30 batters faced; otherwise back off to season-to-date
features.leakage_risk: medium: walks and strikeouts must be prior-game outcomes only
features.required_visual: K-BB% trend with rolling sample size

features.name: Rolling batters faced
features.formula: count distinct plate appearances faced per start and rolling mean by pitcher
features.lookback_window: rolling pitcher starts: 3, 5, 10
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only games completed before the target game date
features.missing_policy: use pitcher season-to-date if rolling window has fewer than 2 starts
features.leakage_risk: low: opportunity proxy from prior starts

features.name: Rolling pitches per start
features.formula: count pitches thrown per start and rolling mean by pitcher
features.lookback_window: rolling pitcher starts: 3, 5, 10
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only games completed before the target game date
features.missing_policy: use season-to-date mean if rolling window is sparse
features.leakage_risk: low: prior workload only

features.name: Called strikes plus whiffs rate
features.formula: called strikes plus swinging strikes divided by total pitches
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 100, 250, 500; season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: minimum 100 pitches; otherwise use season-to-date then league average
features.leakage_risk: low: pitch-level prior outcomes only
features.required_visual: CSW% rolling trend and league percentile

features.name: Pitcher whiff rate
features.formula: swinging strikes divided by swings
features.lookback_window: rolling swings: 50, 100, 250; season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: minimum 50 swings; otherwise use CSW and SwStr fallback features
features.leakage_risk: low: prior pitch outcomes only
features.required_visual: whiff rate rolling distribution by pitcher

features.name: Zone, chase, and contact allowed rates
features.formula: zone pitches, out-of-zone swings, and contact events divided by their eligible pitch denominators
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 250, 500; season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: null when zone/contact classification is unavailable or denominator is below 100
features.leakage_risk: medium: strike-zone definitions must be consistent and prior-only

features.name: Pitch mix by pitch type
features.formula: pitch type count divided by total pitches over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 100, 250, 500; season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: group rare pitch types under other when usage is below 3 percent
features.leakage_risk: low: prior pitch selection only

features.name: Release velocity by pitch type
features.formula: mean and percentile release speed by pitch type over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 50 per pitch family, 250 all pitches; season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: null pitch-type value when fewer than 25 tracked pitches; keep all-pitch velocity
features.leakage_risk: low: tracked pitch measurement from prior games

features.name: Effective velocity by pitch type
features.formula: mean effective speed by pitch type over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 50 per pitch family, 250 all pitches
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: fallback to release velocity when effective speed is absent
features.leakage_risk: low: prior Statcast measurement
features.required_visual: effective velocity versus release velocity scatter

features.name: Release spin rate by pitch type
features.formula: mean and percentile spin rate by pitch type over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 50 per pitch family, 250 all pitches; season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: null pitch-type value when spin is missing or sample is below 25 pitches
features.leakage_risk: low: prior Statcast measurement

features.name: Extension and release point
features.formula: mean extension and release position by pitch type over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 100, 250; season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: null when release tracking is absent; do not impute from future starts
features.leakage_risk: low: prior tracking measurement
features.required_visual: release point scatter by pitch type

features.name: Pitch movement by pitch type
features.formula: mean horizontal and vertical movement by pitch type with velocity-aware context
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 50 per pitch family, 250 all pitches
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: null pitch-type movement when sample is below 25 tracked pitches
features.leakage_risk: low: prior Statcast measurement

features.name: Pitch-type whiff, CSW, and contact
features.formula: whiff, CSW, and contact rates by pitch type over the lookback window
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 50 per pitch family, 250 all pitches
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: collapse low-sample pitch types into pitch family buckets
features.leakage_risk: low: prior pitch outcomes only

features.name: Recent velocity and spin trends
features.formula: recent 2-start mean minus season-to-date mean for velocity and spin by pitch family
features.lookback_window: last 2 starts compared to season-to-date before target game
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: null when either recent or season baseline sample is below 25 tracked pitches
features.leakage_risk: medium: trend window must not include target-game pitches

features.name: Pitcher platoon K, BB, and whiff rates
features.formula: K, BB, and whiff rates split by batter stand against pitcher throwing hand
features.lookback_window: rolling batters faced: 50 per side, season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only games completed before the target game date
features.missing_policy: hierarchical fallback from pitcher split to pitcher overall to league same-hand split
features.leakage_risk: medium: projected opponent handedness must be pre-game only

features.name: Pitcher pitch mix by batter handedness
features.formula: pitch type usage split by batter stand
features.lookback_window: rolling pitches: 100 per side, season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only pitches thrown before the target game date
features.missing_policy: fallback to overall pitch mix for sparse handedness side
features.leakage_risk: low: prior pitch selection only
features.required_visual: pitch mix by LHB/RHB stacked bars

features.name: Projected lineup handedness mix
features.formula: share of projected lineup plate appearances expected from LHB, RHB, and switch hitters
features.lookback_window: projected lineup at pre-game snapshot; fallback to recent team lineup usage
features.timestamp_cutoff: lineup snapshot must be captured before first pitch or odds snapshot being scored
features.missing_policy: fallback to probable team recent lineup handedness with missing flag
features.leakage_risk: high: confirmed lineup timing must be audited against odds snapshot time
features.required_visual: projected lineup handedness donut or stacked bar

features.name: Projected hitter K and contact profile versus pitcher hand
features.formula: projected lineup weighted hitter K%, whiff rate, contact rate, and chase rate versus pitcher hand
features.lookback_window: hitter rolling plate appearances: 50, 100, season-to-date
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only hitter plate appearances completed before target game date
features.missing_policy: fallback from hitter split to hitter overall to league split with missing flags
features.leakage_risk: medium: projected lineup and batter history must be prior-only

features.name: Lineup depth and expected turns
features.formula: expected number of lineup turns and high-K batter exposure for the starter
features.lookback_window: team recent games: 10, 20; pitcher expected batters faced window
features.timestamp_cutoff: use only team and pitcher history before target game
features.missing_policy: fallback to league-average lineup turns with missing flag
features.leakage_risk: medium: do not use target-game actual batting order outcomes
features.required_visual: expected batter exposure by lineup slot

features.name: Opponent lineup recent strikeout form
features.formula: projected lineup weighted recent K%, whiff rate, and contact rate
features.lookback_window: hitter last 14 days and 30 days before target game
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only games completed before target game date
features.missing_policy: fallback to season-to-date hitter profile with recency missing flag
features.leakage_risk: medium: target-day doubleheaders and late games need timestamp filtering
features.required_visual: recent form sparkline by projected hitter

features.name: Pitcher rest days
features.formula: days between target game date and pitcher's previous appearance/start
features.lookback_window: previous pitcher appearance and previous start
features.timestamp_cutoff: before the target game date, use prior completed game dates only
features.missing_policy: rookie/unknown rest is null with missing flag
features.leakage_risk: low: schedule-derived prior appearance timing
features.required_visual: rest days versus strikeout outcome scatter

features.name: Recent pitch count and innings workload
features.formula: rolling pitch counts and innings pitched over recent starts
features.lookback_window: last 1, 3, and 5 starts before target game
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only starts completed before target game date
features.missing_policy: null for pitchers without prior starts; include rookie/role-change flag
features.leakage_risk: low: prior workload only

features.name: Prior start hook pattern
features.formula: rolling distribution of batters faced, pitches thrown, and innings before removal
features.lookback_window: last 5 and 10 starts before target game
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only starts completed before target game date
features.missing_policy: fallback to team starter average with pitcher missing flag
features.leakage_risk: medium: must not use target-game actual removal point

features.name: Blowup and walk risk
features.formula: recent walk, hard-contact, and long-inning indicators that reduce expected batters faced
features.lookback_window: last 3, 5, and 10 starts before target game
features.timestamp_cutoff: include only starts completed before the target game date
features.missing_policy: null when contact quality fields are sparse; include sample-size flags
features.leakage_risk: medium: hard-contact metrics must be prior-only
features.required_visual: blowup-risk components by rolling start window

features.name: Park and home/away context
features.formula: categorical park, home/away, and derived park strikeout factor when source-backed
features.lookback_window: season-to-date and prior-season park context before target game
features.timestamp_cutoff: use venue known before game; derived factors must exclude target game
features.missing_policy: use raw park categorical feature when factor history is missing
features.leakage_risk: medium: park factors must be trained only on prior games
features.required_visual: park factor and home/away split chart

features.name: Pregame weather context
features.formula: temperature, wind, humidity, roof status, and precipitation fields from a pregame weather source
features.lookback_window: weather snapshot nearest odds snapshot before first pitch
features.timestamp_cutoff: weather snapshot must be available before odds snapshot or first pitch
features.missing_policy: null weather values with source and timestamp missing flags
features.leakage_risk: high: weather feeds must not use post-game observed conditions when simulating pregame

features.name: Umpire called-strike tendency
features.formula: rolling umpire called-strike tendency on taken pitches, adjusted by zone bucket when umpire assignment is known pregame
features.lookback_window: umpire prior games in current and prior season
features.timestamp_cutoff: umpire assignment and prior-game history must be known before odds snapshot
features.missing_policy: null when umpire assignment is unavailable before first pitch
features.leakage_risk: high: target-game called strike behavior is forbidden

features.name: Sportsbook strikeout line and price
features.formula: posted pitcher strikeout point and American price by book and side
features.lookback_window: odds snapshots before game start
features.timestamp_cutoff: use only snapshots captured before the prediction cutoff
features.missing_policy: mark candidate blocked when line, side, player, or price is unresolved
features.leakage_risk: medium: never use closing price for pre-close bet recommendation
features.required_visual: line and price distribution by book

features.name: Devigged market probability
features.formula: convert over/under American prices to implied probabilities, then remove hold by book or consensus pair
features.lookback_window: same odds snapshot used for candidate scoring
features.timestamp_cutoff: use only prices available at the prediction cutoff
features.missing_policy: mark as blocked when both sides are not available for devig
features.leakage_risk: medium: close prices only allowed for evaluation, not initial recommendation
features.required_visual: model probability versus devigged market probability scatter

features.name: Market line and price movement
features.formula: difference between latest pre-cutoff snapshot and earlier open/previous snapshots
features.lookback_window: all snapshots from market open through prediction cutoff
features.timestamp_cutoff: before recommendation time, exclude later snapshots
features.missing_policy: null movement when fewer than two pre-cutoff snapshots exist
features.leakage_risk: medium: recommendation-time movement must not include closing movement

features.name: Closing-line value
features.formula: difference between paper bet price and final pregame closing price for the same market
features.lookback_window: post-recommendation evaluation only
features.timestamp_cutoff: not available for pregame recommendation; evaluation artifact only after close
features.missing_policy: null when close snapshot is unavailable
features.leakage_risk: high: forbidden as a model input or bet-selection feature
